name: open-forge
description: Self-host open-source apps on your own cloud, your own VPS, your own Kubernetes cluster, a PaaS, or your own laptop. Chat-friendly interface to existing tools (aws, az, hcloud, doctl, gcloud, flyctl, kubectl, helm, podman, docker, lume, tailscale, ssh, gh) — Claude runs every command; you only answer what/where/how and provide credentials. Supported software: Ghost, OpenClaw, Hermes-Agent, Ollama, Open WebUI. AI stack focus: Ollama (inference server) + Open WebUI (multi-user UI with RAG / web search / image gen / voice) compose into a complete local-AI stack; OpenClaw + Hermes-Agent are AI agent projects that point at Ollama or any OpenAI-compatible backend. Every recipe covers the upstream-blessed install methods documented at the project's official docs site.
